
### File 2: `analysis/00_run_all.qmd`
This is the repo-level runner, and it should contain **only** the second block (also with closing backticks):

```markdown
---
title: "Run all analyses (repo-level)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(quarto)
})

track_runners <- c(
  here::here("analysis", "trackB_singleROI", "00_run_all.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackA_multiROI", "00_run_all.qmd")
)

for (f in track_runners) {
  quarto::quarto_render(input = f, quiet = TRUE)
}

message("DONE. Check outputs/trackB_singleROI and outputs/trackA_multiROI.")
```
